channel.title: Corvus Arcade
channel.description: Most recent updates to Corvus Arcade.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
• Snappier launching. The Play button responds the moment you click it, and shows a loading indicator while your game starts up.
  • Smarter window handling. Corvus Arcade steps aside only once your game is on screen, and comes right back when you close it.
  • Fewer permission pop-ups. Launching a game no longer keeps asking for access to your folders.
  • Smoother play. Your game keeps running smoothly even after your Mac clears out temporary files.
  • Update controls in Settings. Check for updates yourself, and turn automatic updates on or off.
  • Automatic updates are on by default, so you always have the latest alpha.

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
• First public alpha
  • Tested with Battle.net and Overwatch on Apple Silicon
